name: Stuffed Chinese Black Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Wheat germ or bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the tofu in a bowl.
2. Mix all ingredients except the mushrooms in the bowl until thoroughly blended.
3. Stuff each mushroom with the mixture.
4. Top the stuffed mushrooms with more of the mixture, if desired.
5. Grill the stuffed mushrooms for 3-5 minutes on a lightly oiled stovetop grill or an oiled, very hot, thick-bottomed frying pan.
- Alternatively, broil them in the oven for 7-9 minutes.
